title: Hero shows dynamic collaboration badge and currently learning text (happy path)
description: Verifies the homepage Hero displays the collaboration badge and currently learning line as visible content.

title: Hero CTA 'See my work' navigates to Projects
description: Verifies clicking the primary CTA from the Hero takes the user to the Projects page.

title: Hero CTA 'View achievements' navigates to Achievements
description: Verifies clicking the achievements CTA from the Hero takes the user to the Achievements page.

title: Hero renders collaboration badge and learning line after initial load without blank state
description: Verifies the Hero does not remain empty and displays user-facing status content after load.

steps.description: Verify element "See my work" is visible

title: Fallback content is shown when settings cannot be loaded (badge fallback)
description: Verifies that the Hero still shows an 'Open to collaborate' badge even if dynamic settings are unavailable.

title: Fallback content is shown when settings cannot be loaded (learning fallback placeholder)
description: Verifies that the Hero shows the 'Currently learning' line with a placeholder value when dynamic settings are unavailable.

title: Hero social links are visible in the Hero section
description: Verifies that social link entries are present and visible within the Hero area.

steps.description: Verify element "See my work" is visible

title: Achievements page shows filter pills and default content
description: Verifies the Achievements page loads and the filter pills are visible with initial masonry grid content.

steps.description: Verify element "Achievements masonry grid" is visible
Verify element "At least one achievement card" is visible

title: Filter achievements by Certificate pill updates the visible grid
description: Verifies selecting the Certificate filter updates the masonry grid to show certificate items.

steps.description: Verify element "Achievements masonry grid" is visible
Verify element "At least one achievement card" is visible
Verify element "Certificate filter pill is selected" is visible

title: Filter achievements by Participation pill updates the visible grid
description: Verifies selecting the Participation filter updates the masonry grid to show participation items.

steps.description: Verify element "Achievements masonry grid" is visible
Verify element "At least one achievement card" is visible
Verify element "Participation filter pill is selected" is visible

title: Switching filters back to All restores the full list view
description: Verifies the All filter can be re-selected after another filter and the grid remains functional.

steps.description: Verify element "Certificate filter pill is selected" is visible
Verify element "All filter pill is selected" is visible
Verify element "Achievements masonry grid" is visible

title: Open an achievement lightbox and verify full image preview is shown
description: Verifies clicking an achievement thumbnail opens a lightbox with a full-size image preview.

steps.description: Verify element "Lightbox full image" is visible
Verify element "Lightbox close control" is visible

title: Lightbox can be closed after opening an achievement
description: Verifies the user can close the lightbox and return to the masonry grid view.

steps.description: Click on "Close" control in the lightbox
Verify element "Lightbox overlay" is not visible
Verify element "Achievements masonry grid" is visible

title: Lightbox shows image error placeholder when image fails to load and can be closed
description: Verifies that when an achievement image fails to load, an error/placeholder is shown and the lightbox can be closed.

steps.description: Click on an "achievement card thumbnail" known to have a broken image
Verify element "Image error placeholder" is visible
Click on "Close" control in the lightbox
Verify element "Achievements masonry grid" is visible

title: Projects page loads and shows pinned projects and project grid
description: Verifies the /projects page renders the expected pinned section and project grid content for a typical visitor.

title: Open a specific project card (OlivX) and view its details/expanded state
description: Verifies clicking the OlivX project card reveals a detail view or expanded card content on the Projects page.

title: Project card shows status and tech badges
description: Verifies project cards include visible status text and at least one tech badge, indicating metadata is rendered.

title: Fallback scenario: project without liveUrl shows 'Live not available' state
description: Verifies that when a project has no live URL (common in fallback/manual entries), the UI communicates that Live is unavailable and the Live button is disabled or not actionable.

steps.description: Click on a project card that does not show a "Live" link or button
Verify text "Live not available" is visible

title: Fallback/manual projects are still displayed when live data is unavailable (UI-level check)
description: Verifies the Projects page still shows a populated list of project cards (placeholders/manual data) even if live GitHub content is not present.

steps.description: Verify text "Live not available" is visible

title: Projects page remains usable after opening and closing a project detail/expanded card
description: Verifies users can open a project detail/expanded view and return to browsing the project grid without losing page usability.

title: Post a guestbook message and see it appear in the list
description: Verifies a visitor can submit a valid guestbook entry and the new entry becomes visible in the message list.

steps.description: Type "Test Visitor" into the name field
Type "Hello from an automated E2E test." into the message field
Verify text "Hello from an automated E2E test." is visible

title: Realtime update: newly posted message becomes visible without manual refresh
description: Verifies the guestbook list updates immediately after submission, indicating realtime UI update behavior from the user perspective.

steps.description: Type "Realtime Visitor" into the name field
Type "Realtime check message." into the message field
Verify text "Realtime check message." is visible
Verify element "guestbook messages list" is visible

title: Validation: message is required (empty message submission blocked)
description: Verifies submitting with an empty message shows a visible validation error and does not add an entry.

steps.description: Type "Validation Visitor" into the name field
Verify text "message is required" is visible
Type "Now the message is provided." into the message field
Verify text "Now the message is provided." is visible

title: Cybill AI reply appears after a guestbook post (if enabled)
description: Verifies an AI-generated reply appears in the UI after posting a message, or the UI shows a fallback reply text if AI is unavailable.

steps.description: Type "AI Reply Visitor" into the name field
Type "Can Cybill respond to this entry?" into the message field
Verify text "Can Cybill respond to this entry?" is visible

title: Posting multiple distinct messages in one session adds multiple entries
description: Verifies the guestbook can accept more than one submission sequentially and each message appears in the list.

steps.description: Type "Multi Visitor" into the name field
Type "First message in sequence." into the message field
Verify text "First message in sequence." is visible
Type "Second message in sequence." into the message field
Verify text "Second message in sequence." is visible

title: Send a message and receive an AI response with rendered markdown
description: Verifies a visitor can send a chat message and see an AI response rendered with markdown formatting in the chat thread.

steps.description: Type "Please reply with a markdown bullet list of three items." into the chat input
Verify text "Please reply with a markdown bullet list of three items." is visible
Verify element "a chat message rendered as a list (bulleted or numbered)" is visible

title: Clear chat history after a successful conversation
description: Verifies chat history can be cleared and previously visible messages are removed from view.

steps.description: Type "Say hello." into the chat input
Verify text "Say hello." is not visible

title: Send message via Enter key (keyboard submit)
description: Verifies the chat input supports submitting a message using the Enter key and the message appears in the thread.

steps.description: Type "Testing Enter submit" into the chat input
Verify text "Testing Enter submit" is visible
Verify element "an AI response message" is visible

title: Prevent sending an empty message
description: Verifies the UI blocks or ignores sending when the chat input is empty.

steps.description: Verify element "a new user message bubble" is not visible
Verify element "an AI response message" is not visible

title: Long message is accepted and displayed in the chat thread
description: Verifies a longer user message can be sent and is visible without breaking the chat flow.

steps.description: Type "This is a longer message to validate the chat input can handle multiple sentences. Please summarize it back in one sentence." into the chat input
Verify text "This is a longer message to validate the chat input can handle multiple sentences." is visible
Verify element "an AI response message" is visible

title: Now Playing widget shows current track and artist on Home when a track is playing
description: Verifies the Now Playing widget renders a track title and artist name when ListenBrainz reports an active playing track.

steps.description: Verify an element "Track title" is visible in the Now Playing widget
Verify an element "Artist name" is visible in the Now Playing widget
Verify an element "Now Playing widget" is visible

title: When no track is playing, the Now Playing widget is not shown on Home
description: Verifies the widget hides entirely and does not show a placeholder when ListenBrainz indicates nothing is currently playing.

steps.description: Verify text "Now playing" is not visible
Verify element "Now Playing widget" is not visible

title: Now Playing widget does not block other Home page content
description: Verifies Home page primary content still appears even when the Now Playing widget is present or absent.

steps.description: Verify text "Projects" is visible or a "Projects" navigation link is visible
